payload.category_name_raw: Employment and earnings - Ad hoc payments
payload.summary_raw: Payment expected for services on 14 June 2026 - £500.00

fields_raw.name: ReceivedDate
fields_raw.description: Date the payment was received or date the services were completed or provided on, if payment not received

fields_raw.name: JobTitle
fields_raw.description: Type of work or service being provided, if different to the nature of the work provided in parent interest

fields_raw.name: PaymentType
fields_raw.description: Whether the payment was monetary or in kind

fields_raw.name: PaymentDescription
fields_raw.value: To provide one speech as part of the David Lloyd George Memorial Lecture at the annual Gŵyl Cricieth Festival

fields_raw.name: Value
fields_raw.description: Amount or value of the payment

fields_raw.name: HoursWorked
fields_raw.description: Number of hours worked. If a regular payment, this is hours worked per period

fields_raw.name: HoursDetails
fields_raw.description: Additional information about the hours worked
fields_raw.value: Estimated, including providing the lecture and preparation

fields_raw.name: IsUltimatePayerDifferent
fields_raw.description: Whether the ultimate payer is different to the payer specified in linked parent interest

fields_raw.name: UltimatePayerName
fields_raw.description: Name of the ultimate payer (if different to parent interest)

fields_raw.name: UltimatePayerProtectedByConfidentiality
fields_raw.description: Whether the ultimate payer details are confidential (if different to parent interest)

fields_raw.name: UltimatePayerAddress
fields_raw.description: Address of the ultimate payer, if this can be publicly shared (if different to parent interest)

fields_raw.name: UltimatePayerNatureOfBusiness
fields_raw.description: Brief description of the ultimate payer's business (if different to parent interest)

fields_raw.name: IsPaymentDonated
fields_raw.description: Whether the payment was donated to a third party, or will be

fields_raw.name: DonateePaidBy
fields_raw.description: Whether the payment was donated by the Member, or direct from the payer (if donated)
fields_raw.value: Paid direct to the recipient by the payer

fields_raw.name: DonateeType
fields_raw.description: Type of third-party the payment was, or will be, donated to (if donated)

fields_raw.name: DonateeDetails
fields_raw.description: Name of the recipient, if donatee type is 'Other' (if donated)
